series_metadata.series_title: Corrosion Portection Test Variance/Tank Tightness Test Variance
series_metadata.series_description: File contains variance request letters requesting a variance as to tank tightness and corrosion testing methods and details relating to how the test was performed. File also contains records in which BUSTR has reviewed and given variance from the Ohio Revised Code so that a tank tightness test or corrosion test can be performed.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain original in office permanently or until the file is converted to a machine readable format, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records permanently. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
